feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Intercompany purchase for materials with account assignment or Lean services
entry.content:
Hi All

I'm in a greenfield implementation for S4Hana Cloud private.

In this project is required to implement an intercompany process starting in the purchase order but for materials with account assignment or Lean services (this is not possible in advanced intercompany).

For Cloud public edition this scenario exist: Scenario Billing of Costs Between Affiliated Companies (3ZB) but i can't find similar guide for Cloud private.

Can anyone share any implementation guide or documentation about this process?

entry.title: Change warehouse address details
entry.content:
Does anyone know where I can change the address details of a warehouse in customizing?

Thanks for your help in advance,
Hans Osendarp

entry.title: 100% advancepayment for repair sales order
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Could anyone please explain how to create a repairs sales order for 100% advance payment  without using a billing plan and how to set up the pricing procedure, as well as whether we need to set up copy control and make any changes to the billing type configuration?

and is it preferable to create a new sales document type or can we do it in the existing document?

It would be extremely helpful if you could share the procedure.

Thank you in advance.

Regards,

sai

entry.title: Sales PGI to customer stock AUTOMATICALLY?
entry.content:
Dear gurus, Has anybody worked with special stock type B "customer stock" in SD process?

i'm trying to figure out a outbound delivery posts goods issue to customer stock 'special stock type = B , that means, from business perspective, the company has posted cogs, revenue and settled AR with its customer, but leave the product alone in company's place. Customer will pick the goods by itself after days.

It's not sales-in-transit or customer consignment, the only thing differ to the standard sales is just put the goods into customer stock from on hands..

could anyone help here? my appreciate in advance,

entry.title: Is it possible to impute SD revenues into REFX objects in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

Is it now possible in S/4HANA (2022) to impute revenues posted through SD purchase process directly onto an RE-FX object (instead of eOTP, or other classical CO imputation)?
We have looked, we think, everywhere in the customizing, but could not find any place where we could activate RE-FX imputation in SD. For example, in MM no problem, the activation simply takes place in the customizing.

Thank you for your help.

Kind regards,

Benoit

entry.title: Circular Table Join between KNA1 & KNVP
entry.content:
Hello, I am trying to use SQVI to build a table join and am struggling with one part of it. 

I would like to be able to use the company code and partner function in KNVP as selection criteria to find a list of customers with their name and address (I can easily add ADRC to the table join to get detailed address details if required) and who is the sales person responsible for that customer (KUNN2 in KNVP). 

When I build the link of KNA1 to KNVP using KUNNR, it gives me the customer name and address details (even if I have to add ADRC it's easy). Problem is that now I end up with a "customer number" for my sales person responsible in KUNN2. 

I need now to run the circular reference to again look up KUNN2 = KUNNR in KNA1 to get his name vs just his SAP Customer Number. I dont know how to run this circular lookup. Does anyone else have any clue how to do this?

entry.title: Pricing error in item Message no. VF073
entry.content:
Hello.

I get this error in a cancellation invoice that contains only 1 line, a variant configured material and due to this error I have no FI document for it..

I checked all 3 documents: SO, sales invoice and cancellation invoice and they look identical at the pricing procedure level - same number of lines and values, all of the pricing conditions have green traffic light and also all the conditions are within the validity time range.

The pricing procedure has only 1 mandatory condition that was not determined in any document due to requirement not being fulfilled.

I'm not able understand what is wrong here but I'm looking forward to receiving guidance from you, thank you.

entry.title: Transporting cross client object- generated from SLXT
entry.content:
Hello All,

 

I have one problem with transport I have maintained German translations in German language for industry sector(Business partner) via Se63 and then from SLXT I created the transport of copies which has all my translation that I created. Now I am using the standard method to move the TR from Dev system to QA system but changes are not reflecting in QA system even though the TR is released.
Is there any leads how can I transport the translations from one system to another?

Thank you!

entry.title: Avoid PIR While creating 3Party sales order for confirmed date
entry.content:
When creating a third party sales order (item category TAS) initially at the time of creation the confirmed date of the schedule line determines based on the  Purchase Info Record (planned Delivery time). This is not the realistic date.

Now after creation of purchase order - once the vendor acknowledges the PO, the AB line gets updated in the purchase order confirmations tab. Now this Date is updated as the confirmed delivery date in the sales order. This is the realistic date.

Now business want to restrict the confirmed date happening via the purchase information record. This is because to send the realistic date as order acknowledgment to customer.

Can we avoid determination of initial confirmed delivery date which is happening via PIR ?

entry.title: Avoid PIR when creating third party sales order when schedulling
entry.content:
When creating a third party sales order (item category TAS) initially at the time of creation the confirmed date of the schedule line determines based on the  Purchase Info Record (planned Delivery time). This is not the realistic date.

Now after creation of purchase order - once the vendor acknowledges the PO, the AB line gets updated in the purchase order confirmations tab. Now this Date is updated as the confirmed delivery date in the sales order. This is the realistic date.

Now business want to restrict the confirmed date happening via the purchase information record. This is because to send the realistic date as order acknowledgment to customer.

Can we avoid determination of initial confirmed delivery date which is happening via PIR ?

entry.title: Why confirmed date not displaying in CO09
entry.content: I have run V_V2 to confirm the sales orders. The confirmed quantity are visible in the schedule lines but not in the CO09 transaction.

entry.title: REA1 updated in Analysis tab but not in under the condition
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please help with below request .

 We have an issue where the 

Condition contract was created on say 11. September 2023 with validy of 01.May.2023 to 30.04.2025 with certain customer and material combination .

But the there was a sales order created before condiction contract creation with same customer & material combination and having the REA1 determined in sales order and Billing Anlysis in condition tab but not in the condition . How come it is possible ?

also the billing document updated in BUSVOL Report , 

Please guide me , though sales order and billing created before condition contract not sure why condition contract showing under analysis tab of condition tab 

Thanks !

entry.title: Error message during the Invoice Output No outbound service interface for appl. obj. outp. type
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I am setting up the EDI output in S4 Hana system. Though I have done the normal Output configurations, I was not able to see the Output in the invoice.  When I try to add the output manually in the invoice I am getting below error message. No outbound service interface for appl. obj. 9000000001, outp. type ZRD0.

entry.title: SD
entry.content: Resolvido

entry.title: Issue with Zero Net Value in Sales Order After Updating Billing Plan Using BAPIs
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are currently facing an issue with our sales order creation process. Here's the sequence of BAPIs we are using:

1.DIPCOL_COLLECTIVE_RRB
2.BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE
For billing plan updates, we are using:
3.SD_VBKD_READ_WITH_VBELN
4.BILLING_SCHEDULE_READ
5.BILLING_SCHEDULE_SAVE


With this logic, we are able to create and update sales orders, and the billing plan updates perfectly. However, the sales orders are being created with a zero net value. If we exclude the billing plan-related BAPIs (SD_VBKD_READ_WITH_VBELN, BILLING_SCHEDULE_READ, BILLING_SCHEDULE_SAVE), the net value of the sales order calculates correctly.

We have already raised an OSS message, and SAP replied that the FM SD_SALES_BILLINGPLAN_CHANGE is not released. They suggested discussing the issue with an other SAP consultant or making use of the SAP Community.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue or have suggestions on how to resolve this?

Any help or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Sales order specific PO to vendor based on intercompany PO
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to achieve a situation where 1. We have a customer order on Plant A. 2. we have the intercompany PO between Plant A and Plant B. 3. We raise a PO to vendor from plant B. 4. We are expecting both the intercompany PO and vendor PO should have the sales order in the account assignment. 

We are using strategy group 20 in the material master for plant A and the intercompany PO is linked to the sales order through requirement type KE. But even if we use strategy group 20 or 40 or 50 for plant B, the PO to the vendor from plant B does not have the sales order link and the stock is going to generic stock once we receive the goods from vendor. Any idea how can we make the PO to vendor from plant B account assigned to sales order in this intercompany situation? Please note the direct customer order at plant B does have the sales order reference; only issue with the intercompany situation.

Thanks, Anupam

entry.title: what activities are required from SD end merge one plant to another plant of different company code
entry.content:
Requirement is , that plant X (company code CC01)  is merging with Plant Y of company code CC02 so please help in to identify the activities required to perform from SD perspective 

what set of configuration , assignment will be done for this activity

entry.title: SD/EWM Real Open Quantities in Sales Schedule Agreement / Schedule Lines
entry.content:
Hi SAP Masters,

I am a recent SAP S4HANA Public Cloud User with EWM and found out that in SAP universe, when there is an Outbound Delivery created, this reduces our Open Quantity as if this was already shipped, but since it is only created and we are waiting for the truck to arrive, it is a bit misleading to say that the quantity is already delivered, could anyone share any suggestion on how to tackle this simple problem?

We would like to know all real open quantities, not 1 by 1 check.

To be able to check also our real backlog with our customers

entry.title: T-code : FD32 Run time error for change credit account.
entry.content: I encountered an issue when attempting to change the credit account using transaction code FD32. The process took an unusually long time to save, and ultimately resulted in a runtime error.I attempted to implement note 99937 - Credit Management: Runtime error TIME_OUT, but unfortunately, the issue continues to persist. Can you suggest any alternative methods for recommending solutions?

entry.title: Requirement to trigger the workflow based on pricing communication data during Sales Order Create
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

We have a requirement to trigger the workflow based on pricing communication data. We created the workflow and implemented Badi SD_APM_SET_APPROVAL_REASON but it doesn't have pricing communication as importing and even standard CDS available for pricing will not return the pricing data during first time create of sales order as it is not created yet. There are blog that says about the data to be transferred from Order Item to Pricing, however is there any business process that would pass on the data from pricing communication to item of the order. Just FYI, order item has subtotal fields available to aggregate the values from the pricing procedure but all of them are occupied. Unfortunately, I couldn't find any solution for this yet. Have anyone came across such requirement and able to crack, request your inputs on it.

Best,

HP
